Sannel.Encoding.Manager
Table of Contents

Interface IProcessRunner

Namespace
Sannel.Encoding.Manager.HandBrake
Assembly
Sannel.Encoding.Manager.HandBrake.dll

Abstraction over System.Diagnostics.Process to allow unit testing without spawning real processes.

public interface IProcessRunner

Methods

RunAsync(string, IEnumerable<string>, CancellationToken)

Runs a process to completion, capturing all stdout and stderr.

Task<ProcessResult> RunAsync(string fileName, IEnumerable<string> arguments, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

fileName string
arguments IEnumerable<string>
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Task<ProcessResult>

RunWithLineCallbackAsync(string, IEnumerable<string>, Action<string>, CancellationToken)

Runs a process and streams stdout lines as they arrive. Stderr is captured fully and returned in the result.

Task<ProcessResult> RunWithLineCallbackAsync(string fileName, IEnumerable<string> arguments, Action<string> onOutputLine, CancellationToken ct = default)

Parameters

fileName string
arguments IEnumerable<string>
onOutputLine Action<string>
ct CancellationToken

Returns

Task<ProcessResult>
